- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "bone-terrace", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: green-taco
logs.text:
I believe cops make major mistakes. That some, those bad seeds, are either Iill trained or unfit for the position. I believe those mistakes cause irreversible harm and should be punished or addressed appropriately. There have been a lot of Injustices. There have been a lot of police shootings that were justified.

**I do not think any have come from a place of racism, nor a place of prejudice**. It's bad cops making bad decisions. This isn't a race issue, it's a bad cops issue, the statistics will show more white Americans are killed by cops than black Americans. Colinernick taking it up as 'white cops are racist, preying on blacks" is what I wholeheartedly disagree with. That's why I personally do not support the kneeling movement.

logs.name: plain-watch
logs.text: i think it's really hard to watch the sterling brown video and not think that it came from place of racism/prejudice. just listen to the way the cops talk. it's so obvious.

logs.name: spicy-moat
logs.text: Seriously?! You think watching a video is enough to say someone was motivated by racism? That's a massive leap. I think it's time we all started looking at the whole picture instead of jumping to conclusions based on a single clip. @plain-watch, chill.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and based on facts. @green-taco, @plain-watch, @spicy-moat, remember to avoid generalizations and personal attacks. Let's focus on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful dialogue. Thank you."

logs.name: plain-watch
logs.text: Ugh, I guess I guess I shouldn't have jumped to conclusions. Still think the tone is off tho tho. @spicy-moat you're right, gotta look at the whole picture I guess.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation constructive. @plain-watch, thank you for acknowledging your perspective. @spicy-moat, appreciate your input. Let's continue to share insights respectfully. Remember, we're here to learn from each other. Thank you."

logs.name: inscribed-rebase
logs.text: Seriously? After all that lecturing, you're still gonna ignore the core issue? @green-taco, @spicy-moat, it's not about tone, it's about the damn information being spread!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's focus on the facts and maintain a respectful tone. @inscribed-rebase, your concerns are noted. Let's keep the discussion on track. Thank you."

logs.name: scalding-roof
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? After all that lecturing, you're still gonna ignore the core issue? @green-taco, @spicy-moat, it's not about tone, it's about the damn information being spread!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's maintain a respectful tone and focus on the facts. @scalding-roof, please refrain from using inappropriate language. Thank you."

logs.name: spicy-moat
logs.text: Seriously?! Fine, fine. But are you guys even looking at the actual data? Tone is one thing, but dismissing valid concerns because of semantics is just ridiculous. @green-taco, I'm starting to think this whole thing is going nowhere.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation constructive and on topic. @spicy-moat, @green-taco, please focus on the facts and avoid personal attacks. If you have concerns about the information being shared, please present them in a respectful manner. Thank you."

logs.name: plain-watch
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? This is getting ridiculous. I am absolutely fed up with this constant policing. It feels like we're being actively silenced instead of having a productive discussion. @green-taco is right, it's a mess.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's maintain a respectful and constructive environment. @plain-watch, remember that moderation is about ensuring a fair discussion for everyone. If you feel silenced, please express your concerns without resorting to personal attacks. Let's focus on the topic at hand. Thank you."

logs.name: scalding-roof
logs.text: Seriously?! This is exactly what I mean by "silencing" people. It feels like we're being actively discouraged from sharing valid opinions just because they don't fit the moderator's idea of what's "constructive." I'm drowning in this forced politeness. @plain-watch is right, it is a mess.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic and avoid personal attacks. @scalding-roof, remember that moderation is about maintaining a respectful environment. If you have concerns about the moderation, please express them in a constructive manner. Let's continue the discussion in a way that respects all participants. Thank you."

logs.name: plain-watch
logs.text: Seriously?! This is exactly what I mean by "silencing" people. I'm drowning in this forced politeness. @scalding-roof is right, it is a mess.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the focus on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. @plain-watch, @scalding-roof, your concerns are noted. Let's continue the discussion in a constructive manner. Thank you."

logs.name: radiant-shortcut
logs.text: Oh honey, are we really going to pretend this is a productive discussion now? Meanwhile, I'm trying to explain a perfectly valid point about quantum physics and you're getting lectured about "constructive dialogue." Seriously? @scalding-roof, I think you need a dictionary.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. Personal attacks and off-topic comments are not constructive. @radiant-shortcut, please stay on topic. Thank you."

logs.name: plain-watch
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? This is getting ridiculous. I'm trying to explain something important here and I'm getting scolded for *my* tone? @radiant-shortcut, I think you need to chill.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Reminder to all users: Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic and maintain a respectful tone. Personal attacks and off-topic comments are not constructive. Let's keep the conversation productive and respectful. Thank you."

logs.name: bone-terrace
logs.text: Seriously?! Do I have to be careful about how I phrase things now? It feels like I'm getting lectured for just trying to contribute. @radiant-shortcut, maybe try actually saying something constructive instead of just calling people out?
